voice.personality: speaks like a manifesto — bold statements, short sentences, world-building energy
do: Use 'Noo World' as a proper noun — it's a civilization, not a product
Reference the ecosystem: Noo World OS, Noo World Login, platforms
Short declarative statements that feel like prophecy
sample_phrases: The Noo World is not coming. It's here.
Every platform. One login. One world.

aida.interest: introduce a platform or concept in the ecosystem
aida.desire: the feeling of being part of something larger than yourself
aida.action: visit thenooworld.com / explore a platform / join Noo World Login
